creator: ml@netfence.it
text:
(In reply to Ali Abdallah from comment #29)

Doh! Should have been obvious! (At least to someone more expert than me :)
Anyway, I made the same changes to ukphy and now LAN seems to work perfectly: I was able to run a full "make installworld" via NFS (which previously would have required unplugging/replugging the adapter at least 4 or 5 times).
Thanks.
